Items.Title: WeatherLink Live Host
Items.Description: Optional. IP address or hostname of the local WeatherLink Live device. When unavailable, the driver falls back to cloud weather data.

Items.Title: OpenWeather API Key
Items.Description: API key used with SimpleWeatherClient for forecast data and fallback current conditions.

Items.Title: Location Name Override
Items.Description: Optional. When provided, this name is used in the current conditions title instead of the cloud-derived location name.

Items.Title: Latitude Override
Items.Description: Optional. Leave blank to use the Crestron Home system latitude for cloud weather requests.

Items.Title: Longitude Override
Items.Description: Optional. Leave blank to use the Crestron Home system longitude for cloud weather requests.

Items.Title: Units
Items.Description: Select the preferred display units for temperature and weather data.

Items.Title: Refresh Interval Seconds
Items.Description: How often the driver refreshes current conditions. Forecast/cloud refreshes follow their own startup, manual, and daily refresh rules.
